---
name: review-current-file
description : review current file
model: Auto (copilot)
agent: JavaDocAgent
---


Create a review for the current file. The review should include:
1. A summary of the file's purpose and functionality.
2. An analysis of the code structure and organization.

Do not include any suggestions for code changes or improvements. Focus solely on providing an objective review of the file's content and structure.
Do not use other file only review the current file. Do not use any other file for reference.
